widgets.title: Temperature (C)
widgets.extra_filter: target_ip is '{{DEVICE_IP}}' and ((sensor_type_label contains 'temperature' or sensor_type_label contains 'celsius') or sensor_units_label = 'Celsius' or sensor_units_label = 'C') and (sensor_value is not empty and sensor_value != 65535 and sensor_value < 150)

widgets.title: Temperature (C)
widgets.extra_filter: target_ip is '{{DEVICE_IP}}' and (collection is 'environmental_temperature' or sensor_type_label contains 'celsius' or sensor_units_label = 'Celsius' or sensor_units_label = 'C') and (sensor_value is not empty and sensor_value != 65535 and sensor_value < 150)

widgets.title: Power (Watts / dBm)
widgets.extra_filter: target_ip is '{{DEVICE_IP}}' and (sensor_type_label is not empty and (sensor_type_label = 'watts' or sensor_type_label = 'dBm' ))

widgets.title: Power (A)
widgets.extra_filter: target_ip is '{{DEVICE_IP}}' and (sensor_type_label is not empty and sensor_type_label = 'amperes')

widgets.title: Power (V)
widgets.extra_filter: target_ip is '{{DEVICE_IP}}' and (sensor_type_label is not empty and (sensor_type_label = 'voltsAC' or sensor_type_label = 'voltsDC'))

custom_columns.label: Sensor Status
custom_columns.htmlTemplate: {%raw%}{{ rowData.Sensor_Status }}{%endraw%}
